title: Baby New Potato Curry with Garam Masala
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired curry made with tender baby new potatoes, a blend of warming spices, and a hint of creaminess. This comforting dish is reminiscent of homemade meals from a bygone era.

ingredients.name: red chili powder
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste for spice level

instructions: Heat the ghee or vegan butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook, stirring occasionally, for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the garam masala, cumin, coriander, and chili powder. Cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the baby new potatoes, salt, and 100ml of water. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-12 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the remaining 100ml of water and non-dairy yogurt (if using).
Return the saucepan to low heat and simmer, uncovered, for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
